title: Chief Operating Officer
summary: The Chief Operating Officer turns Neuroartan’s direction into clear priorities, steady execution, and accountable delivery.
biography: This executive seat is open. Neuroartan has defined the role before appointing a public holder so the standard is clear from the beginning.
The role turns strategy into roadmaps, milestones, execution rhythm, and cross-functional alignment across the company.
This profile remains role-first until a human executive is hired, verified, and approved for publication.
mandate: Make Neuroartan operationally clear: the right priorities, the right sequence, and the discipline to deliver without drift.
